entry.title: IDC EDFSA09D0014 (P00129) awarded to HIGHER EDUCATION ASSISTANCE AGENCY, PA, was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:typeOfContractPricing.description: FIXED PRICE WITH ECONOMIC PRICE ADJUSTMENT

ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: THE PURPOSE OF THIS MODIFICAATION IS TO MODIFY THE PRICING STRUCTURE IN SECTION B OF THE IDIQ CONTRACT, AND TO INCORPORATE THE REQUIREMENTS OF CR-5536.

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: YES - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS USED.

ns1:principalNAICSCode.description: OTHER ACTIVITIES RELATED TO CREDIT INTERMEDIATION

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

entry.title: IDC EDFSA09D0014 (P00139) awarded to HIGHER EDUCATION ASSISTANCE AGENCY, PA, was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:typeOfContractPricing.description: FIXED PRICE WITH ECONOMIC PRICE ADJUSTMENT

ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: THE PURPOSE OF THIS MODIFICATION IS TO MODIFY THE PRICING STRUCTURE IN SECTION B, PREVIOUSLY REVISED PER MODIFICATION P00129. TO INCORPORATE THE REQUIREMENTS OF (CR)S 5991 AND 6019 AND TO INCORPORATE POSTAGE COSTS FOR (CR)S 5881,5963 AND 5991 TO CLIN A023.

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: YES - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS USED.

ns1:principalNAICSCode.description: OTHER ACTIVITIES RELATED TO CREDIT INTERMEDIATION
